title: Vanilla Fusion
description: Designed for use in a SMP and based off of the Vanilla Perfected modpack, this modpack includes major performance, QOL, and appearance mods to "fuse" the best of vanilla with the QOL of mods.
body:
#### Designed for use in a SMP and based off of the Vanilla Perfected modpack, this modpack includes major performance, QOL, and appearance mods to "fuse" the best of vanilla with the QOL of mods.

This modpack was design for 1.21.1. It is **unlikely** that this will get updated to a newer version unless there is high demand.

Several changes were made to demonjoeTV's [Vanilla Perfected](https://modrinth.com/modpack/vanilla-perfected) modpack to add some basic mods commonly seen in bigger modpacks, as well as some glaringly obvious missing mods from the original. While this modpack isn't completely vanilla, it is intended for people who do not want to commit to a full modpack and still would like to enjoy the core game. Please go and support demonjoeTV's modpack too!

Note: This change list does **not** include libraries and/or APIs.

#### Removed:
- AL’s Creepers Revamped
- Cherished Worlds
- Continuity
- Customizable Elytra
- Detail Armor Bar
- Even Better Enchants
- Fancy Crops
- Fresh Skeleton Physics
- Mace but 3D
- Mob Crates
- Music Delay Remover (Infinite Music)
- Noisium
- Nvidium
- Recolourful Containers GUI + HUD
- Remove Reloading Screen
- ReplayMod
- Simple Grass Flowers
- Skin Shuffle
- Very Many Players (Fabric)
- Visual: Armor Trims
- World Play Time
- Freecam
- qrafty’s Capitalized Font

#### Added:
- AppleSkin
- Armor Stand Poses
- Better Advancements
- CC: Tweaked
- Camerapture
- Carry On
- Cave Dust
- Chat Animation [Smooth Chat]
- Chat Heads
- Chunk Loaders
- Comforts
- Controlling
- Crafting Tweaks
- Distant Horizons
- EMI
- EMI Enchanting
- EMI Loot
- Falling Leaves
- Gravestones
- Hang Glider
- Item Highlighter
- Jade Addons (Fabric)
- Jade 🔍
- Lootr
- More Chat History
- Mouse Tweaks
- Nature’s Compass
- Nemo’s Inventory Sorting
- Polymorph
- Real Nicknames
- Seamless Loading Screen
- Sit
- Sodium Dynamic Lights
- Sodium Extras
- Sophisticated Backpacks
- Sophisticated Core
- Sophisticated Storage
- Sophisticated Storage in Motion
- Sound Physics Remastered
- Spawn Animations
- Spleef Toys
- Subtle Effects
- Terralith
- Tom’s Peripherals
- Tom’s Simple Storage Mod
- Tom’s Trading Network
- Veinminer
- Veinminer Enchantment
- Visual Workbench
- Waystones
- What Are They Up To (Watut)'
- Xaero’s Minimap
- Xaero’s World Map
- XaeroPlus
- Your Reputation (Jade)

#### Changed:
- Complementary Shaders Reimagined -> Complementary Shaders – Unbound
